title: Create a Branch for a Small Fix
description: A typo in `README.md` needs a quick fix, but your team policy says never commit directly to `main`. Create a new branch, make the fix there, and commit it.
objective: A branch named `fix/readme-typo` must exist and be exactly one commit ahead of `main`. `main` must stay unchanged. On `fix/readme-typo`, `README.md` must replace `GitArnea` with `GitArena`. The working tree must be clean.
hints: Create a branch first: `git switch -c fix/readme-typo`.
Use `git log --oneline --decorate --all` to verify `main` stayed unchanged.
